texto: A radical love story is the only device that makes the time-chariot of a village, a city, a country, gallop faster. Such a love story pulls the wheels of that chariot from a murky, regressive past towards a spotlessly clean road under autumn-blue skies. And for that chariot to move forward, to bring change in the village, you don’t have to be conscious of being a radical. You just have to fall in love.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Aruni Kashyap sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “A radical love story is the only device that makes the time-chariot of a village, a city, a count…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, love, romance, útil em momentos de mudanca e viagem.
